reference_scope: aMule peer capabilities; completed ed2k-refactor capability decisions
acceptance: Local capabilities advertise only fully implemented send, receive, state, error, and fallback paths after hardening.
verification: Source inspection confirmed no new local claims for multipacket, extended multipacket, crypt, secure-ident, Kad, or file identifiers; no capability bits changed.
notes: Local capability truth remains aligned with implemented peer send/receive paths.

reference_scope: Motrix Next ED2K status needs; aria2-next RPC patterns
acceptance: Runtime state visible to integrations accurately distinguishes queued, waiting, retrying, dead-source, callback, LowID, and transfer states where exposed.
verification: Focused RpcMethodTest::testGatherProgressEd2kStatus passed with lowIdPeerCount and callbackWaitingPeerCount coverage.
notes: Stable aggregate fields were added without exposing volatile per-peer internals.

acceptance: Docs describe real supported ED2K download behavior, configuration boundaries, and limitations without overclaiming public-network success.
verification: README and manual diffs reviewed; no completion surface changed.
notes: High-level ED2K docs now mention upload cooperation, queue maintenance, and the hardening tracker.

target_files: Build presets and full test suite
acceptance: Final local configure, build, tests, and version command pass.
verification: cmake --preset default, cmake --build --preset default, ctest --preset default, and build/default/aria2-next --version passed.
notes: Public ED2K smoke is manual evidence only.
